tools.description: Analyzes set-piece frequency and territorial pressure by evaluating historical corner statistics.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL t_corners = TO_INTEGER(HC) + TO_INTEGER(AC),
       h_corners = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HC), TO_INTEGER(AC)),
       a_corners = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HC), TO_INTEGER(AC)),
       is_over_95 = CASE(TO_INTEGER(HC) + TO_INTEGER(AC) > 9.5, 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    avg_total_corners = ROUND(AVG(t_corners), 2),
    home_team_corner_avg = ROUND(AVG(h_corners), 2),
    away_team_corner_avg = ROUND(AVG(a_corners), 2),
    high_volume_count = SUM(is_over_95)
| EVAL 
    over_95_corner_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(high_volume_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP avg_total_corners, home_team_corner_avg, away_team_corner_avg, over_95_corner_pct, sample_size

tools.description: Evaluates defensive reliability by calculating the frequency of "Clean Sheets" (zero goals conceded) for both teams. This tool provides a percentage-based look at "Shutout Probability" based on recent league fixtures. Use this to help sports journalists identify elite defensive units, in-form goalkeepers, or matchups where a "win-to-nil" is a high-probability narrative beat.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL h_clean = CASE((HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) == 0) OR (AwayTeam == {{home_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTHG) == 0), 1, 0),
       a_clean = CASE((HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) == 0) OR (AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTHG) == 0), 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    h_clean_count = SUM(h_clean),
    a_clean_count = SUM(a_clean)
| EVAL 
    home_team_shutout_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(h_clean_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1),
    away_team_shutout_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(a_clean_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP home_team_shutout_pct, away_team_shutout_pct, sample_size

tools.description: Evaluates the disciplinary profile of a matchup by analyzing historical yellow and red card frequencies. It calculates the average card count per match, individual team disciplinary records, and the statistical likelihood of high-caution (3.5+ yellows) or "incident-heavy" (red card) fixtures. Use this to provide insights into match tension, tactical discipline, and potential suspension risks for sports news reports.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL t_yellows = TO_INTEGER(HY) + TO_INTEGER(AY),
       t_reds = TO_INTEGER(HR) + TO_INTEGER(AR),
       h_total_cards = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HY) + TO_INTEGER(HR), TO_INTEGER(AY) + TO_INTEGER(AR)),
       a_total_cards = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HY) + TO_INTEGER(HR), TO_INTEGER(AY) + TO_INTEGER(AR)),
       is_high_caution = CASE(TO_INTEGER(HY) + TO_INTEGER(AY) > 3.5, 1, 0),
       has_red = CASE(TO_INTEGER(HR) + TO_INTEGER(AR) > 0, 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    avg_yellows_per_match = ROUND(AVG(t_yellows), 2),
    home_team_discipline_avg = ROUND(AVG(h_total_cards), 2),
    away_team_discipline_avg = ROUND(AVG(a_total_cards), 2),
    high_caution_count = SUM(is_high_caution),
    red_card_incident_count = SUM(has_red)
| EVAL 
    high_caution_match_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(high_caution_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1),
    red_card_probability_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(red_card_incident_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP avg_yellows_per_match, home_team_discipline_avg, away_team_discipline_avg, high_caution_match_pct, red_card_probability_pct, sample_size

tools.description: Evaluates a team's tactical resilience by calculating the frequency of "outcome pairing"—specifically the likelihood of a team avoiding defeat (Win or Draw) or the probability of a decisive result (Home or Away win). Use this tool to provide insights for sports reports on "unbeaten streaks," defensive stability, or identifying high-stakes matchups where a stalemate is statistically unlikely. It helps analysts quantify which side is most reliable at securing at least one point from a fixture.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (
    HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR
    HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}}
  )
| SORT Date DESC
| LIMIT 30
| STATS
    total_matches = COUNT(*),
    home_or_draw = COUNT(CASE(FTR != "A", 1, NULL)),
    away_or_draw = COUNT(CASE(FTR != "H", 1, NULL)),
    home_or_away = COUNT(CASE(FTR != "D", 1, NULL))
| EVAL
    home_or_draw_pct = ROUND(
      CASE(
        total_matches > 0,
        TO_DOUBLE(home_or_draw) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches) * 100.0,
        33.3
      ), 1
    ),
    away_or_draw_pct = ROUND(
      CASE(
        total_matches > 0,
        TO_DOUBLE(away_or_draw) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches) * 100.0,
        33.3
      ), 1
    ),
    home_or_away_pct = ROUND(
      CASE(
        total_matches > 0,
        TO_DOUBLE(home_or_away) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches) * 100.0,
        66.7
      ), 1
    )
| KEEP home_or_draw_pct, away_or_draw_pct, home_or_away_pct, total_matches
| LIMIT 1

tools.description: Performs a deep statistical analysis of match outcomes (Home Win, Draw, Away Win) for two specific teams within a league. It retrieves the most recent 30 matches involving either team to calculate current form and head-to-head dominance. The tool returns percentage-based probabilities for each outcome and a "h2h_count" to help the agent determine the reliability of the head-to-head data.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| STATS 
    total_matches = COUNT(*),
    h_wins = COUNT(CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "H", 1, AwayTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "A", 1, NULL)),
    a_wins = COUNT(CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "H", 1, AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "A", 1, NULL)),
    draws = COUNT(CASE(FTR == "D", 1, NULL)),
    h2h_matches = COUNT(CASE((HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND AwayTeam == {{away_team}}) OR (HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND HomeTeam == {{home_team}}), 1, NULL))
| EVAL 
    home_win_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(h_wins) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1),
    away_win_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(a_wins) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1),
    draw_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(draws) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP home_win_pct, away_win_pct, draw_pct, total_matches, h2h_matches

tools.description: Categorizes historical match intensity by calculating the frequency of specific goal ranges (Low: 0-1, Standard: 2-3, High: 4+). This "Goal Density" analysis allows sports journalists to characterize the typical nature of a matchup, identifying whether these teams traditionally engage in tactical, low-scoring affairs or high-volatility, high-scoring matches.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL total_goals = TO_INTEGER(FTHG) + TO_INTEGER(FTAG), 
       goal_range = CASE(total_goals <= 1, "0-1 goals", 
                         total_goals <= 3, "2-3 goals", 
                         "4+ goals") 
| STATS range_count = COUNT(*) BY goal_range 
| INLINESTATS total_all = SUM(range_count) 
| EVAL occurrence_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(range_count) / TO_DOUBLE(total_all) * 100.0, 1) 
| SORT range_count DESC

tools.description: Provides league-wide performance benchmarks to contextualize team-specific data. It retrieves the average goals, cards, and corners for the entire division. This allows the agent to explain if a team's performance is "Above League Average," helping journalists ground their reports in the broader reality of the current season.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}}
| STATS 
    league_avg_goals = ROUND(AVG(TO_INTEGER(FTHG) + TO_INTEGER(FTAG)), 2),
    league_avg_cards = ROUND(AVG(TO_INTEGER(HY) + TO_INTEGER(AY)), 2),
    league_btts_rate = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(SUM(CASE(TO_INTEGER(FTHG) > 0 AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) > 0, 1, 0))) / TO_DOUBLE(COUNT(*))) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP league_avg_goals, league_avg_cards, league_btts_rate

tools.description: Evaluates the historical frequency of "Both Teams to Score" (BTTS) to determine the likelihood of a balanced offensive exchange. This tool calculates the percentage of matches where neither side kept a clean sheet, providing sports analysts with a metric for "Offensive Parity." It is essential for identifying matchups between two high-functioning attacks or games likely to result in a competitive, multi-sided scoreline.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL both_scored = CASE(TO_INTEGER(FTHG) > 0 AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) > 0, 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    btts_yes_count = SUM(both_scored)
| EVAL 
    btts_yes_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(btts_yes_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1),
    btts_no_pct = ROUND(100.0 - btts_yes_pct, 1)
| KEEP btts_yes_pct, btts_no_pct, sample_size

tools.description: Evaluates offensive intensity and clinical finishing by analyzing shot volume and conversion efficiency. It calculates the average total shots per match, the frequency of high-volume attacking games (15+ shots), and team-specific shot-on-target (SoT) metrics. This tool allows analysts and sports reporters to differentiate between "dominant but wasteful" offenses and "clinical" finishers, providing a deeper understanding of a team's attacking threat.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL t_shots = TO_INTEGER(HS) + TO_INTEGER(AS),
       t_sot = TO_INTEGER(HST) + TO_INTEGER(AST),
       h_team_shots = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HS), TO_INTEGER(AS)),
       h_team_sot = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HST), TO_INTEGER(AST)),
       a_team_shots = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HS), TO_INTEGER(AS)),
       a_team_sot = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(HST), TO_INTEGER(AST)),
       is_high_volume = CASE((TO_INTEGER(HS) + TO_INTEGER(AS)) > 15, 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    avg_total_shots = ROUND(AVG(t_shots), 2),
    avg_total_sot = ROUND(AVG(t_sot), 2),
    home_team_avg_shots = ROUND(AVG(h_team_shots), 2),
    home_team_avg_sot = ROUND(AVG(h_team_sot), 2),
    away_team_avg_shots = ROUND(AVG(a_team_shots), 2),
    away_team_avg_sot = ROUND(AVG(a_team_sot), 2),
    high_volume_count = SUM(is_high_volume)
| EVAL 
    high_volume_match_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(high_volume_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1),
    overall_shot_accuracy_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(avg_total_sot) / TO_DOUBLE(avg_total_shots)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP avg_total_shots, avg_total_sot, home_team_avg_shots, home_team_avg_sot, away_team_avg_shots, away_team_avg_sot, high_volume_match_pct, overall_shot_accuracy_pct, sample_size

tools.description: Quantifies match volatility and scoring density by analyzing the frequency with which matches involving these teams exceed specific goal thresholds (from 0.5 to 4.5+ goals). This tool allows analysts and sports journalists to identify "high-scoring" offensive trends or "low-scoring" defensive stalemates. It provides a data-backed foundation for predicting the "flow" of a game and whether a fixture is likely to be a defensive battle or an open, attacking display.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL total_goals = TO_INTEGER(FTHG) + TO_INTEGER(FTAG)
| STATS 
    total_matches = COUNT(*),
    g05 = COUNT(CASE(total_goals > 0.5, 1, NULL)),
    g15 = COUNT(CASE(total_goals > 1.5, 1, NULL)),
    g25 = COUNT(CASE(total_goals > 2.5, 1, NULL)),
    g35 = COUNT(CASE(total_goals > 3.5, 1, NULL)),
    g45 = COUNT(CASE(total_goals > 4.5, 1, NULL))
| EVAL 
    threshold_05_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(g05) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1),
    threshold_15_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(g15) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1),
    threshold_25_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(g25) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1),
    threshold_35_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(g35) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1),
    threshold_45_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(g45) / TO_DOUBLE(total_matches)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP threshold_05_pct, threshold_15_pct, threshold_25_pct, threshold_35_pct, threshold_45_pct, total_matches

tools.description: Tracks the immediate competitive trajectory of a team by analyzing the last 5 results. It assigns a weighted "Momentum Score" to identify if a team is on an upward trend or a downward spiral. This is critical for analysts to distinguish between a season-long powerhouse and a team currently experiencing a crisis of form.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{team_name}} OR AwayTeam == {{team_name}})
| SORT Date DESC
| LIMIT 5
| EVAL points = CASE((HomeTeam == {{team_name}} AND FTR == "H") OR (AwayTeam == {{team_name}} AND FTR == "A"), 3, FTR == "D", 1, 0)
| STATS total_points = SUM(points), avg_goals = AVG(CASE(HomeTeam == {{team_name}}, TO_INTEGER(FTHG), TO_INTEGER(FTAG)))
| EVAL form_label = CASE(total_points >= 12, "Elite", total_points >= 9, "Strong", total_points >= 5, "Average", "Struggling")
| KEEP total_points, avg_goals, form_label

tools.description: Analyzes schedule density to identify potential player fatigue or rotation risks. By measuring the number of days since the team's last fixture, analysts can predict if a squad will be at peak physical performance or if "Leg-Weariness" will play a tactical role in the match narrative.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{team_name}} OR AwayTeam == {{team_name}})
| SORT Date DESC
| LIMIT 2
| STATS last_match_str = MAX(Date), prev_match_str = MIN(Date)
| EVAL last_date = TO_DATETIME(last_match_str), 
       prev_date = TO_DATETIME(prev_match_str)
| EVAL days_between_fixtures = DATE_DIFF("day", prev_date, last_date)
| KEEP days_between_fixtures

tools.description: Identifies the most frequent final scorelines (Score Distribution) for recent fixtures involving these teams. This identifies "modal" outcomes, helping analysts predict typical game flow and score density. Use this tool to describe the "typical" result between teams—for example, if a matchup usually ends in a low-scoring stalemate or a specific recurring scoreline.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL scoreline = CONCAT(TO_STRING(TO_INTEGER(FTHG)), "-", TO_STRING(TO_INTEGER(FTAG)))
| STATS frequency = COUNT(*) BY scoreline
| INLINESTATS total_all = SUM(frequency)
| EVAL occurrence_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(frequency) / TO_DOUBLE(total_all)) * 100.0, 1)
| SORT frequency DESC
| LIMIT 5

tools.description: Generates a high-level strategic overview of a matchup using advanced performance metrics. It calculates an "Expected Goals (xG) Proxy" to measure attacking quality, a "Form Momentum Score" based on points earned in recent fixtures, and a "Head-to-Head Dominance" factor. This tool is designed for deep-dive match previews, allowing analysts to identify teams that are over-performing or under-performing their underlying statistics.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL 
    h_points = CASE((HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "H") OR (AwayTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "A"), 3, FTR == "D", 1, 0),
    a_points = CASE((HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "H") OR (AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "A"), 3, FTR == "D", 1, 0),
    h_xg = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, (TO_DOUBLE(HST)*0.15 + TO_DOUBLE(HS)*0.05), (TO_DOUBLE(AST)*0.15 + TO_DOUBLE(AS)*0.05)),
    a_xg = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, (TO_DOUBLE(HST)*0.15 + TO_DOUBLE(HS)*0.05), (TO_DOUBLE(AST)*0.15 + TO_DOUBLE(AS)*0.05)),
    is_h2h_win = CASE((HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "H") OR (AwayTeam == {{home_team}} AND HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "A"), 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    home_momentum_score = ROUND(AVG(h_points), 2),
    away_momentum_score = ROUND(AVG(a_points), 2),
    home_expected_threat = ROUND(AVG(h_xg), 2),
    away_expected_threat = ROUND(AVG(a_xg), 2),
    h2h_dominance_count = SUM(is_h2h_win)
| KEEP home_momentum_score, away_momentum_score, home_expected_threat, away_expected_threat, h2h_dominance_count, sample_size

tools.description: Conducts a granular analysis of offensive output for both the home and away sides. It calculates individual scoring averages and "Multi-Goal Frequency" (the consistency of scoring 2 or more goals) based on recent league fixtures. This tool allows analysts to identify which team possesses the superior attacking momentum and provides sports journalists with data to highlight "scoring threats" or "offensive droughts" ahead of a matchup.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL 
    h_goals = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(FTHG), TO_INTEGER(FTAG)),
    a_goals = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(FTHG), TO_INTEGER(FTAG)),
    h_multi = CASE((HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTHG) >= 2) OR (AwayTeam == {{home_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) >= 2), 1, 0),
    a_multi = CASE((HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTHG) >= 2) OR (AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) >= 2), 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    home_avg = ROUND(AVG(h_goals), 2),
    away_avg = ROUND(AVG(a_goals), 2),
    home_multi_count = SUM(h_multi),
    away_multi_count = SUM(a_multi)
| EVAL 
    home_multi_goal_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(home_multi_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1),
    away_multi_goal_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(away_multi_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP home_avg, home_multi_goal_pct, away_avg, away_multi_goal_pct, sample_size

tools.description: Evaluates the impact of venue on team performance by calculating the "Home Win Rate" for the hosting side and the "Away Win Rate" for the visitors. It further analyzes the average goal differential at these specific venues. Use this tool to identify "Home Fortress" trends or "Away Day" vulnerabilities, allowing analysts to determine if venue-based momentum will be a deciding factor in the fixture narrative.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL 
    is_home_match = (HomeTeam == {{home_team}}),
    is_away_match = (AwayTeam == {{away_team}}),
    h_win = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "H", 1, 0),
    a_win = CASE(AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "A", 1, 0),
    h_diff = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(FTHG) - TO_INTEGER(FTAG), NULL),
    a_diff = CASE(AwayTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(FTAG) - TO_INTEGER(FTHG), NULL)
| STATS 
    home_sample = COUNT(h_diff),
    away_sample = COUNT(a_diff),
    home_win_count = SUM(h_win),
    away_win_count = SUM(a_win),
    home_avg_margin = ROUND(AVG(h_diff), 2),
    away_avg_margin = ROUND(AVG(a_diff), 2)
| EVAL 
    home_win_rate_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(home_win_count) / TO_DOUBLE(home_sample)) * 100.0, 1),
    away_win_rate_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(away_win_count) / TO_DOUBLE(away_sample)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP home_win_rate_pct, away_win_rate_pct, home_avg_margin, away_avg_margin, home_sample, away_sample

tools.description: Evaluates the historical margin of victory and defensive dominance for both teams. It calculates the average goal differential and the frequency of "Win-to-Nil" outcomes (winning without conceding). This tool allows analysts to identify "dominant winners" who maintain defensive integrity while attacking, providing a metric for match control and competitive superiority.
tools.ESQL:
FROM football_matches
| WHERE Div == {{div}} AND (HomeTeam == {{home_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{home_team}} OR HomeTeam == {{away_team}} OR AwayTeam == {{away_team}})
| EVAL 
    h_diff = CASE(HomeTeam == {{home_team}}, TO_INTEGER(FTHG) - TO_INTEGER(FTAG), TO_INTEGER(FTAG) - TO_INTEGER(FTHG)),
    a_diff = CASE(HomeTeam == {{away_team}}, TO_INTEGER(FTHG) - TO_INTEGER(FTAG), TO_INTEGER(FTAG) - TO_INTEGER(FTHG)),
    h_win_nil = CASE((HomeTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "H" AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) == 0) OR (AwayTeam == {{home_team}} AND FTR == "A" AND TO_INTEGER(FTHG) == 0), 1, 0),
    a_win_nil = CASE((HomeTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "H" AND TO_INTEGER(FTAG) == 0) OR (AwayTeam == {{away_team}} AND FTR == "A" AND TO_INTEGER(FTHG) == 0), 1, 0)
| STATS 
    sample_size = COUNT(*),
    home_avg_margin = ROUND(AVG(h_diff), 2),
    away_avg_margin = ROUND(AVG(a_diff), 2),
    h_win_nil_count = SUM(h_win_nil),
    a_win_nil_count = SUM(a_win_nil)
| EVAL 
    home_win_to_nil_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(h_win_nil_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1),
    away_win_to_nil_pct = ROUND((TO_DOUBLE(a_win_nil_count) / TO_DOUBLE(sample_size)) * 100.0, 1)
| KEEP home_avg_margin, away_avg_margin, home_win_to_nil_pct, away_win_to_nil_pct, sample_size
